scripts.dev: node -e 'if (!require("fs").existsSync("node_modules")) { console.error("\x1b[31m%s\x1b[0m", "HALT: Local packages not found. Please run `pnpm install` to stock the kitchen."); process.exit(1); }' && node -e 'console.log("\x1b[32m%s\x1b[0m", "✅ Kitchen is prepped. Frontend Workspace available at: http://localhost:3001");'
